title: Connected boards in WorkForms
excerpt: I’ve enabled the monday.labs feature that is supposed to enable questions to link to boards. Example: I have a board that contains a list of device models and would like the form question to populate a dropdown with thes…

posts.author: cire12 (Eric Powelson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve enabled the monday.labs feature that is supposed to enable questions to link to boards. Example: I have a board that contains a list of device models and would like the form question to populate a dropdown with these items.

Once enabled I see no option when creating questions to define any associations. What am I missing?

image1334×204 20.6 KB

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @cire12

Unlike other fields, with connected boards, you first need to add it to the board, and only then can you add it to your forms.

If you want to use Connected Boards in anonymous forms/ set static and dynamic default values, and more, you can check out our app Easyform in the monday marketplace.

Checkout our documentation site.

Book a call, where we will walk you through and help you set up your forms and boards.

Or reach out to our support with any questions at easyformsupport@easyappshq.com

posts.author: Kristi.TD (Kristi TD)
posts.cookedHtml: I had the same problem, I then deactivated and reactivated it, refreshed my browser and that made it work. Hope that helps.
